About Names Starting with I

The letter I contains a selection of names spanning multiple cultures, languages, and historical periods.

Each name links to a comprehensive statistics page where you can discover how many people share that name, its historical popularity trends, gender distribution, regional presence across 80+ countries, and lists of similar names.

Try the tool

Check any I-name's popularity instantly

Type a name starting with I and see how many people share it worldwide.

Instant No signup 100M+ names · 80+ countries
